title: Real Horror A Realistic Horror Modpack
description: A Realistic Minecraft Horror Modpack both focusing on realistic aspects and looks.
body: Real Horror is a realistic horror modpack that uses Patrix 32x resource pack and BSL shaders along with adding some mods that add realistic aspects to the game such as Enhanced Visuals, Tough As Nails, Ambient Sounds, Sound Physics Remastered, and LambDynamicLights, adding in features like bleeding when hit, thirst and tempature, more ambience, realisto sound, and dynamic lights. The modpack also has essential so you can play with friends without needing a server. The modpack features a variety of monsters trying to kill you. Remember you are not the hunter in this modpack, you are the hunted.
